name: FileGltfWriteOptions
summary: Options used when writing a glTF file

constructors.name: FileGltfWriteOptions
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FileGltfWriteOptions class

methods.name: ToDictionary
methods.summary: Create a dictionary of these options. This dictionary can be passed to the RhinoDoc.Export function

properties.name: CullBackfaces
properties.summary: Setting that determines whether or not the meshes in the glTF will be rendered with or without backface culling. Known as DoubleSided in the glTF specification.

properties.name: DracoCompressionLevel
properties.summary: The level of compression used by draco in the range of 1 to 10 inclusive.

properties.name: DracoQuantizationBitsNormal
properties.summary: The number of bits used when quantizing mesh normals in the range of 8 to 32 inclusive

properties.name: DracoQuantizationBitsPosition
properties.summary: The number of bits used when quantizing mesh vertex positions in the range of 8 to 32 inclusive

properties.name: DracoQuantizationBitsTextureCoordinate
properties.summary: The number of bits used when quantizing mesh texture coordinates in the range of 8 to 32 inclusive

properties.name: ExportLayers
properties.summary: glTF uses a scene hierarchy structure where nodes are organized in a parent-child relationship. This setting enables/disables the writing of empty nodes with the same names as layers and places exported objects a children of the corresponding layer node.

properties.name: ExportMaterials
properties.summary: Setting to determine whether or not materials are written to the glTF file

properties.name: ExportOpenMeshes
properties.summary: Enable/disable the exporting of open meshes

properties.name: ExportTextureCoordinates
properties.summary: Enable/disable the exporting of texture coordinates

properties.name: ExportVertexColors
properties.summary: Enable/disable the export of vertex colors

properties.name: ExportVertexNormals
properties.summary: Enable/disable the exporting of vertex normals

properties.name: MapZToY
properties.summary: Setting to transform Rhino's Z axis to glTF's Y axis

properties.name: SubDMeshType
properties.summary: The mesh type for exported SubDs

properties.name: SubDSurfaceMeshingDensity
properties.summary: Determines how coarse the mesh output will be when surface meshing subd objects See comments for ON_SubDDisplayParameters in opennurbs_mesh.h for details regarding numbers used.

properties.name: UseDisplayColorForUnsetMaterials
properties.summary: Setting to display color as material when material index for object is -1.

properties.name: UseDracoCompression
properties.summary: Enable/disable the use of Draco mesh compression in the glTF file
